---
title: "The Waning of Ideology? Presidential elections in the Republic of Cyprus, 5 February 2023"
author: "Triga, V., Ioannidis, N., and Djouvas, C."
date: 2024-01-01
description: "South European Society and Politics, 28(2). doi: 10.1080/13608746.2024.2304445"
categories: [Applied Political Communication]
image: images_publications/journal-article.png
---
